case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. CHRISTOPHER KAZOR

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KAZOR, CHRISTOPHER SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
